item.title: SOL Price Prediction: Dead Cat Bounce to $95 Before Reality Check | Solana's grinding above major moving averages while retail pile into longs, but the beari... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260420-price-prediction-sol-dead-cat-bounce-to-95-before
item.description:
Original title: SOL Price Prediction: Dead Cat Bounce to $95 Before Reality Check Summary: Solana's grinding above major moving averages while retail pile into longs, but the bearish MACD divergence and massive gap to the 200 SMA signals a 65% probability of rejection at $89-95 resistanc Article text: Solana's grinding above major moving averages while retail pile into longs, but the bearish MACD divergence and massive gap to the 200 SMA signals a 65% probability of rejection at $89-95 resistanc...
SOL is playing games in no-man's land at $85.21, caught between the short-term bulls and the bigger picture bears. The price action over the past 24 hours shows classic consolidation behavior - tight range between $82.94 and $87.12 with modest volume of $219M. What's telling is how SOL keeps bumping its head against that $87 level while the daily ATR of $4.23 suggests we're coiling for a bigger move.
The momentum indicators are sending mixed signals that experienced traders know to read carefully. RSI sitting dead center at 50.26 means neither side has conviction yet, but that MACD histogram flatlining at 0.0000 after recent bullish momentum is a red flag. When momentum stalls at these levels, it typically precedes a reversal, not continuation.
The technical setup reveals SOL's vulnerability. Trading above the 20 SMA at $83.69 and roughly in line with the 50 SMA at $85.91 gives bulls some comfort, but the elephant in the room is that 200 SMA sitting 47% higher at $125.56. That's not a gap you close easily in this macro environment.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
The Bollinger Band position at 0.64 shows SOL sitting in the upper portion of its recent range, suggesting limited upside before hitting resistance. Strong resistance at $89.27 aligns perfectly with historical rejection zones, while immediate resistance at $87.24 has already proven sticky in recent sessions. On the downside, $83.06 support looks fragile given the lack of volume conviction, and if that breaks, $80.91 becomes the line in the sand.
The derivatives market is screaming warning signals that retail hasn't picked up on yet. With 73.1% of retail traders long and even the smart money at 74.4% long, we're seeing classic late-cycle positioning. When everyone's on the same side of the boat, it usually tips over.
The negative funding rate of -0.0013% suggests shorts are getting paid to hold their positions, which typically occurs when spot price is running ahead of futures - a bearish divergence. Meanwhile, that 2.85% increase in open interest to nearly $791M shows more leverage entering the system just as technical momentum is fading.
The January predictions calling for $150-155 targets and even $1,000 by year-end look increasingly divorced from current price action. Those calls were made when SOL had different momentum characteristics and before this consolidation phase revealed underlying weakness.
The setup favors a tactical short with tight risk management. Entry zone between $87-89 offers favorable risk-reward as SOL approaches confluence resistance. Stop loss above $91 keeps risk controlled while targeting the $75-77 zone represents a logical 15-20% correction that would reset the technical picture.
For bulls waiting to buy the dip, patience pays here. Any break below $83 support invalidates the near-term bullish case and opens the door to $75. That level coincides with the lower Bollinger Band projection and would represent a healthy 12% correction from current levels.
The probabilities favor a 65% chance of rejection at current resistance levels followed by a test of lower support, versus a 35% chance of a breakout above $90 that could target $95-100. But even in the bullish scenario, the gap to meaningful resistance around $125 makes this a trading bounce, not an investment opportunity.
Position accordingly and keep stops tight - this market doesn't forgive sloppy risk management.

item.title: ETH Price Prediction: $2,400 Breakout or $2,200 Breakdown in Next 10 Days | ETH's Technical Reality Check Ethereum is trading in classic consolidation mode, trapped... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260420-price-prediction-eth-2400-breakout-or-2200-breakdown-...
item.description:
Original title: ETH Price Prediction: $2,400 Breakout or $2,200 Breakdown in Next 10 Days Summary: ETH's Technical Reality Check Ethereum is trading in classic consolidation mode, trapped between the 20-day moving average floor at $2,231 and overhead resistance around $2,400. The RSI sitting at. Article text: ETH's Technical Reality Check Ethereum is trading in classic consolidation mode, trapped between the 20-day moving average floor at $2,231 and overhead resistance around $2,400. The RSI sitting at...
Ethereum is trading in classic consolidation mode, trapped between the 20-day moving average floor at $2,231 and overhead resistance around $2,400. The RSI sitting at 55.69 tells the real story here - momentum has completely flattened out after the recent climb, with neither buyers nor sellers taking decisive control.
The MACD histogram at zero confirms this stalemate. We're seeing classic indecision territory where any catalyst could trigger a violent move in either direction. What's particularly interesting is ETH's position at 68% up the Bollinger Band range - not quite overbought, but definitely in territory where profit-taking becomes tempting for swing traders.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
The daily ATR of $113 means we should expect roughly 5% daily moves, which puts the $2,400 resistance and $2,200 support levels firmly in play for any meaningful breakout attempt.
The derivatives market is flashing warning signals that traders need to respect. With $646 million in spot volume and retail traders holding a massive 2.14:1 long bias, we're seeing classic late-cycle positioning. When 68% of retail is betting one direction, the smart play is often preparing for the opposite.
However, the top traders ratio at 1.63:1 long suggests institutional money isn't entirely bearish. The balanced taker buy/sell ratio near 0.98 indicates professional flow remains measured rather than panicked. This creates an interesting dynamic where retail euphoria meets institutional caution.
Open interest climbing 3.3% to over $5 billion shows fresh money entering positions, but the slightly negative funding rate suggests shorts are getting paid to hold - typically a sign that the market expects downside rather than euphoric continuation.
CoinCodex's recent projections targeting $3,357 by early January and $3,660 by late January paint an optimistic picture, but these models often extrapolate momentum without accounting for resistance clusters. The absence of fresh KOL predictions in the last 24 hours suggests the influencer crowd is waiting for clearer directional signals rather than front-running moves.
With ETH trading roughly 19% below its 200-day moving average at $2,845, any sustained rally faces the reality of significant overhead supply. The gap between current price and these longer-term averages creates natural profit-taking zones that will test buyer conviction.
ETH faces a binary setup over the next 10 days. The 65% probability scenario sees momentum building toward the $2,400 resistance zone, potentially triggered by any positive regulatory news or institutional adoption headlines. A clean break above $2,400 with volume would target the $2,500-2,600 range where the next major supply cluster sits.
The 35% bearish scenario becomes active if ETH fails to reclaim the $2,350 level within 48 hours. Retail positioning being this skewed long creates fuel for a squeeze toward $2,200, where the 20-day moving average and psychological support converge. Below $2,200, the 50-day average at $2,143 becomes the next logical target.
Risk management is critical here. Any position above $2,350 should target $2,420-2,450 for initial profit-taking. Conversely, shorts triggered below $2,280 can aim for $2,200-2,220 with stops above $2,330. The key inflection point remains $2,305 - hold above and bulls maintain control, break below and bears take the wheel for at least a week.

item.title: Bitcoin Breaks $82K in 30 Days as Institutional Reset Completes | Bitcoin's technical consolidation at $75K masks aggressive institutional positioning that... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260420-prediction-bitcoin-breaks-82k-in-30-days-as
item.description:
Original title: Bitcoin Breaks $82K in 30 Days as Institutional Reset Completes Summary: Bitcoin's technical consolidation at $75K masks aggressive institutional positioning that drives price to $82,000 within 30 days. The derivatives market shows smart money loading up while retail re Article text: Bitcoin's technical consolidation at $75K masks aggressive institutional positioning that drives price to $82,000 within 30 days. The derivatives market shows smart money loading up while retail re...
Bitcoin sits at $75K in a technical sweet spot that institutional traders dream about. The RSI at 58.46 shows momentum without exhaustion while the MACD histogram flatlining signals accumulation, not weakness. Smart money recognizes this pattern – a coiled spring ready to launch.
The Bollinger Band positioning tells the complete story. At 0.75, Bitcoin hugs the upper range without breaking into unsustainable territory. The upper band at $78,127 provides immediate resistance while the 7-day SMA at $75,094 creates a launching pad. This $3K range compression precedes explosive moves.
Institutional positioning reveals the next move before price does. Open interest surged 5.33% in 24 hours to $7.4 billion – serious capital deployment that dwarfs retail activity. The negative funding rate of -0.0048% means shorts pay longs, creating natural buying pressure that compounds upward momentum.
Professional traders show perfect indecision at 49.2% long versus 50.8% short. This balanced positioning typically precedes major directional moves as one side gets forced out rapidly. The taker buy/sell ratio at 0.94 confirms methodical accumulation rather than emotional selling.
The fundamental backdrop transforms technical setups into sustained moves. Institutional adoption creates persistent buying pressure that technical breakouts amplify rather than fade. Corporate treasuries and investment funds operate on longer timeframes that support aggressive upside targets beyond traditional retail thinking.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
Professional money managers position for scenarios that retail investors dismiss as impossible. The same institutional conviction driving current derivatives positioning supports price targets that seem aggressive today but logical in execution.
Bitcoin breaks $78,127 resistance within seven days, targeting $82,000 by mid-May. The sequence runs through $77,500 first, then $80K psychological resistance before reaching the primary target where profit-taking intensifies.
A convincing break above $82K opens the path toward $90K as the 200-day SMA at $86,351 becomes magnetic for momentum algorithms. The technical reset is complete – institutional demand now determines whether this setup delivers the breakout that derivatives positioning anticipates.
The 20-day SMA at $71,938 provides the critical support level. Any close below flips the narrative bearish and invalidates the institutional accumulation thesis. Until then, the risk/reward strongly favors the upside as technical compression meets institutional demand.

item.title: NVIDIA Deploys Humanoid Robots in German Factories as Industrial AI Goes Live | NVIDIA and partners demonstrate factory-ready AI at Hannover Messe 2026, with humanoid ro... https://Blockchain.News/news/nvidia-humanoid-robots-german-factories-hannover-messe-20...
item.description:
Original title: NVIDIA Deploys Humanoid Robots in German Factories as Industrial AI Goes Live Summary: NVIDIA and partners demonstrate factory-ready AI at Hannover Messe 2026, with humanoid robots now operating in BMW and Siemens production facilities. Article text: NVIDIA and partners demonstrate factory-ready AI at Hannover Messe 2026, with humanoid robots now operating in BMW and Siemens production facilities.
Humanoid robots aren't just demo units anymore. At Hannover Messe 2026, NVIDIA and its manufacturing partners revealed that AI-powered robots have moved from simulation labs into actual German production lines—including facilities operated by BMW and Siemens.
The shift from proof-of-concept to production deployment marks a turning point for industrial automation. Humanoid's HMND 01 robot, running on NVIDIA's Jetson Thor edge AI module, has completed autonomous logistics operations at Siemens' electronics factory in Erlangen. The company claims its simulation-first approach compressed two years of typical hardware development into seven months.
Meanwhile, Hexagon Robotics announced its AEON humanoid will perform assembly operations at BMW's Leipzig plant—one of the first humanoid deployments in a German automotive production environment.
Deutsche Telekom's Industrial AI Cloud, built on NVIDIA infrastructure, is positioning itself as Europe's sovereign AI backbone for manufacturing. The platform already hosts workloads from Siemens, SAP, and automotive engineering firm EDAG, which announced it will run its industrial metaverse platform on the cloud.
This matters for manufacturers weighing data sovereignty concerns against the need for massive compute power. Running AI physics simulations and factory-scale digital twins requires infrastructure most companies can't build themselves.
Toyota is already using Invisible AI's new Vision Execution System to analyze every production cycle in real time. The system deploys autonomous AI agents that flag issues before they compound—a capability that Terex, with its 40+ global plants, expects will deliver a 3% yield increase and 10% reduction in rework.
Energy contractor Saipem is deploying Fogsphere's Vision Agent platform to detect high-risk safety events in real time across industrial sites.
The announcements reveal an industrial AI stack that's finally production-ready: sovereign cloud infrastructure, digital twin platforms from Siemens and Dassault Systèmes, and physical robots validated through simulation before deployment. SCHUNK's GROW automation cell, designed to bring physical AI to Europe's small and mid-sized manufacturers, suggests the technology won't stay confined to automotive giants.
For investors tracking NVIDIA's industrial push, the Hannover Messe demonstrations show enterprise AI revenue streams extending well beyond data centers. The question now is how quickly manufacturers can absorb the technology—and whether the seven-month development cycles Humanoid claims become the new standard.
NVIDIA and partners demonstrate factory-ready AI at Hannover Messe 2026, with humanoid robots now operating in BMW and Siemens production facilities.
Humanoid robots aren't just demo units anymore. At Hannover Messe 2026, NVIDIA and its manufacturing partners revealed that AI-powered robots have moved from simulation labs into actual German production lines—including facilities operated by BMW and Siemens.
The shift from proof-of-concept to production deployment marks a turning point for industrial automation. Humanoid's HMND 01 robot, running on NVIDIA's Jetson Thor edge AI module, has completed autonomous logistics operations at Siemens' electronics factory in Erlangen. The company claims its simulation-first approach compressed two years of typical hardware development into seven months.
Meanwhile, Hexagon Robotics announced its AEON humanoid will perform assembly operations at BMW's Leipzig plant—one of the first humanoid deployments in a German automotive production environment.

The announcements reveal an industrial AI stack that's finally production-ready: sovereign cloud infrastructure, digital twin platforms from Siemens and Dassault Systèmes, and physical robots validated through simulation before deployment. SCHUNK's GROW automation cell, designed to bring physical AI to Europe's small and mid-sized manufacturers, suggests the technology won't stay confined to automotive giants.

item.title: AAVE Token Crashes 20% as $293M Kelp DAO Hack Triggers $8B TVL Exodus | Aave loses $8 billion in TVL after hackers use stolen Kelp DAO funds as collateral, creat... https://Blockchain.News/news/aave-crashes-kelp-dao-hack-8b-tvl-exodus
item.description:
Original title: AAVE Token Crashes 20% as $293M Kelp DAO Hack Triggers $8B TVL Exodus Summary: Aave loses $8 billion in TVL after hackers use stolen Kelp DAO funds as collateral, creating $195M in bad debt and freezing $5.1B in stablecoins. Article text: Aave loses $8 billion in TVL after hackers use stolen Kelp DAO funds as collateral, creating $195M in bad debt and freezing $5.1B in stablecoins.
Aave just lost its crown as DeFi's largest protocol. A $293 million exploit at Kelp DAO cascaded into an $8 billion TVL collapse at Aave over the weekend, with the AAVE token plunging 20% from $112 to $89.50 in roughly 25 hours.
The damage extends far beyond one protocol. Over $5.1 billion in USDT and USDC sits frozen in Aave v3 lending pools, now at 100% utilization. Depositors can't withdraw until new liquidity arrives or borrowers repay.
Saturday's attack on Kelp DAO's LayerZero bridge netted hackers 116,500 rsETH tokens. Rather than immediately dumping them, the attackers got creative—they posted the stolen assets as collateral on Aave v3 and borrowed wrapped Ether against them.
This created approximately $195 million in "bad debt" on Aave, according to Lookonchain. The rsETH collateral, now tainted by the exploit, became essentially worthless for recovery purposes.
What followed was predictable: a bank run. DeFiLlama data shows Aave's TVL cratered from $26.4 billion to $18.6 billion by Sunday. Major players fled first. MEXC pulled $431 million. Abraxas Capital yanked $392 million.
The USDT pool tells the story. Out of $2.87 billion deposited, exactly $2,540 was available for withdrawal at one point. That's not a typo—two thousand dollars liquid in a nearly three-billion-dollar pool.
Aave responded by freezing rsETH markets on both v3 and v4 versions. WETH reserves got locked down across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, Mantle, and Linea. The protocol maintains that rsETH on Ethereum mainnet remains fully backed by underlying assets, though that's cold comfort for those who can't access their stablecoins.
The ripple effects keep spreading. Curve Finance, Ethena, and BitGo's WBTC have all paused LayerZero bridge integrations until the mess gets sorted.
This marks the first real stress test of Aave's "Umbrella" security model, introduced in June 2025 to automate protection against bad debt. The timing couldn't be worse—Aave parted ways with risk manager Chaos Labs just two weeks ago over disagreements about v4 direction and budget.
A Bank of Canada study earlier this month praised Aave v3 for avoiding bad debt through overcollateralization and automated liquidations. That analysis aged poorly.
The immediate question: when do stablecoin pools unlock? That depends entirely on whether new deposits arrive or existing borrowers repay. Neither seems imminent given current sentiment.
Aave v4 just launched at EthCC with a new "hub-and-spoke" architecture for real-world assets. Whether that expansion continues on schedule while the protocol manages this crisis remains unclear. For traders, the AAVE token at $89.50 represents either a buying opportunity or a falling knife—the next few days of TVL data will tell which.

item.title: BTC Cycle Shows Just 97% Gains From Halving as Volatility Hits Historic Lows | Galaxy's Alex Thorn flags Bitcoin's weakest halving cycle ever with only 97% gains versus... https://Blockchain.News/news/btc-cycle-97-percent-gains-halving-volatility-historic-lows
item.description:
Original title: BTC Cycle Shows Just 97% Gains From Halving as Volatility Hits Historic Lows Summary: Galaxy's Alex Thorn flags Bitcoin's weakest halving cycle ever with only 97% gains versus 761%+ in prior cycles. Volatility at 1.75% signals structural shift. Article text: Galaxy's Alex Thorn flags Bitcoin's weakest halving cycle ever with only 97% gains versus 761%+ in prior cycles. Volatility at 1.75% signals structural shift.
Bitcoin's current market cycle is performing dramatically worse than any previous halving cycle, with gains of just 97% from the April 2024 halving price compared to triple and quadruple-digit returns in earlier eras. The data raises uncomfortable questions about whether BTC's legendary boom cycles are becoming a relic of the past.
Alex Thorn, head of firmwide research at Galaxy, published the sobering comparison on April 19, showing the current cycle's peak at $125,000 in October 2025 represents a fraction of historical performance. For context: the 2020 cycle delivered 761% gains, 2016 saw 2,950%, and the 2012 cycle produced a staggering 9,294% return.
"Cycle four is dramatically underperforming prior cycles," Thorn wrote on X. "Is this the new normal, or is it the new normal until it isn't?"
The numbers tell a stark story. Bitcoin's 30-day volatility index hasn't exceeded 3.11% this entire cycle—a level last touched in August 2024. Compare that to April 2020, when the same gauge spiked to 9.64%. Current readings sit at just 1.75%, according to Bitbo data.
For traders who built strategies around Bitcoin's wild swings, this compression matters. Lower volatility typically means tighter ranges, fewer breakout opportunities, and a market that increasingly moves with macro factors rather than crypto-native catalysts.
BTC traded at approximately $74,984 as of April 19, up nearly 5% over the past week but still roughly 40% below its October 2025 peak.
Critics of Thorn's analysis point to a key anomaly: Bitcoin hit an all-time high above $70,000 in March 2024—before the halving even occurred. That had never happened in previous cycles.
The culprit? Spot Bitcoin ETF approvals in January 2024 pulled forward demand that would typically materialize post-halving. This front-running effect may have compressed the cycle's upside before it officially began, making direct comparisons to earlier halvings somewhat misleading.
Fidelity Digital Assets offers another perspective worth considering. While upside has diminished, so have drawdowns. Previous bear markets saw Bitcoin crash 80-90% from peaks. The current decline from $125,000 to around $60,000 represents roughly 50%—painful, but structurally different from historical wipeouts.
VanEck CEO Jan van Eck suggested in March that Bitcoin is nearing a bottom, with gradual price recovery expected through 2026. Whether that plays out depends partly on whether the muted cycle dynamics represent maturation or temporary suppression.
The institutional infrastructure now surrounding Bitcoin—ETFs, corporate treasuries, regulated custody—has fundamentally altered how capital flows into the asset. Michael Saylor's Strategy continues accumulating, with recent signals pointing to another major purchase. Meanwhile, mining operations expand as Alcoa reportedly moves to sell a dormant smelter to NYDIG.
For traders, the takeaway is practical: strategies calibrated to 2020-era volatility need recalibration. Bitcoin isn't dead, but it may be growing up—and that comes with different risk-reward profiles than the wild west days.

item.title: ENA Poised for $0.15 Rally as Whale Accumulation Accelerates | Institutional money pours into ENA at current $0.12 levels while technical setup builds t... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260419-prediction-ena-poised-for-015-rally-as-whale
item.description:
Original title: ENA Poised for $0.15 Rally as Whale Accumulation Accelerates Summary: Institutional money pours into ENA at current $0.12 levels while technical setup builds toward 25% breakout above key $0.13 resistance zone. Article text: Institutional money pours into ENA at current $0.12 levels while technical setup builds toward 25% breakout above key $0.13 resistance zone.
ENA has established a clear accumulation base around $0.12, with price action consolidating near key resistance levels. The token is holding above critical support while building the foundation for its next major move higher.
Recent price behavior shows controlled buying pressure without excessive volatility—exactly what you want to see before a sustained breakout attempt. The measured consolidation suggests institutional positioning rather than speculative retail activity.
Open interest surged 14.82% in 24 hours while funding rates remain neutral, indicating fresh institutional capital entering positions without creating leverage imbalances. The $61.4 million open interest reflects serious institutional commitment to current levels.
Top traders maintain a 2.42x long bias compared to retail's 2.15x positioning. When professional and retail sentiment align bullish during consolidation phases, the resulting moves tend to be decisive and sustained. The balanced taker flow ratio of 0.94 confirms steady accumulation rather than momentum chasing.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
This institutional backing provides the fuel needed for ENA to challenge overhead resistance zones effectively.
The regulatory concerns surrounding stablecoin yields that weighed on ENA earlier have been largely absorbed by the market. Institutional adoption continues expanding while ecosystem development maintains momentum.
Without major negative catalysts on the horizon, technical levels become the primary driver for near-term price action. This creates a cleaner setup where chart patterns and whale positioning carry more weight than external noise.
ENA faces immediate resistance at $0.13, but the accumulation pattern and whale positioning suggest this level will be taken out within the next two weeks. Once $0.13 breaks, momentum should carry price toward the $0.15 target zone.
The setup offers defined risk parameters with support holding at $0.11. Breaking above $0.13 opens the path for a 25% move to $0.15, while any breakdown below $0.11 would invalidate the bullish thesis.
Current positioning data and technical structure favor the upside scenario. The combination of institutional accumulation and controlled consolidation typically precedes strong directional moves in crypto markets.
ENA is building the foundation for its next significant rally, with $0.15 representing a realistic target within the coming two weeks.

The setup offers defined risk parameters with support holding at $0.11. Breaking above $0.13 opens the path for a 25% move to $0.15, while any breakdown below $0.11 would invalidate the bullish thesis.
Current positioning data and technical structure favor the upside scenario. The combination of institutional accumulation and controlled consolidation typically precedes strong directional moves in crypto markets.
ENA is building the foundation for its next significant rally, with $0.15 representing a realistic target within the coming two weeks.
Institutional money pours into ENA at current $0.12 levels while technical setup builds toward 25% breakout above key $0.13 resistance zone.
ENA has established a clear accumulation base around $0.12, with price action consolidating near key resistance levels. The token is holding above critical support while building the foundation for its next major move higher.
Recent price behavior shows controlled buying pressure without excessive volatility—exactly what you want to see before a sustained breakout attempt. The measured consolidation suggests institutional positioning rather than speculative retail activity.
Open interest surged 14.82% in 24 hours while funding rates remain neutral, indicating fresh institutional capital entering positions without creating leverage imbalances. The $61.4 million open interest reflects serious institutional commitment to current levels.
Top traders maintain a 2.42x long bias compared to retail's 2.15x positioning. When professional and retail sentiment align bullish during consolidation phases, the resulting moves tend to be decisive and sustained. The balanced taker flow ratio of 0.94 confirms steady accumulation rather than momentum chasing.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
This institutional backing provides the fuel needed for ENA to challenge overhead resistance zones effectively.

item.title: USDE Stablecoin Holds $1.00 Peg Despite Zero Volume - Prepare for Q2 Volatility Spike | USDE maintains its dollar peg with artificially suppressed volatility and $18M daily volu... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260419-prediction-usde-stablecoin-holds-100-peg...
item.description:
Original title: USDE Stablecoin Holds $1.00 Peg Despite Zero Volume - Prepare for Q2 Volatility Spike Summary: USDE maintains its dollar peg with artificially suppressed volatility and $18M daily volume. Technical compression suggests 15-20% price swing incoming as peg mechanisms face real-world stress test Article text: USDE maintains its dollar peg with artificially suppressed volatility and $18M daily volume. Technical compression suggests 15-20% price swing incoming as peg mechanisms face real-world stress test...
USDE trades at exactly $1.00 with the kind of mechanical precision that should concern anyone paying attention. The $18 million in daily volume represents genuine interest, but the complete absence of price movement suggests algorithmic peg maintenance working overtime.
Stablecoins don't naturally trade with zero volatility. When price action gets this compressed, the underlying mechanisms are either perfectly calibrated or under significant strain. Given the broader crypto market's turbulence, perfect calibration seems unlikely.
The RSI at 48.89 shows neither buying nor selling pressure, which is unusual for any asset with meaningful volume. MACD readings hover at zero while Bollinger Bands have contracted to their tightest levels in months. This technical setup typically precedes significant price movement in either direction.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
Moving averages have converged at $1.00, creating a decision point that can't persist indefinitely. The ATR near zero confirms that volatility has been artificially suppressed, but physics suggests this compression will eventually release.
The absence of significant whale activity or social media discussion around USDE reflects either complete confidence in the peg mechanism or institutional positioning happening below the radar. Both scenarios create asymmetric risk for retail traders.
Stablecoin depegging events historically occur without warning, often triggered by external factors rather than technical breakdowns. The current setup places USDE in a vulnerable position should broader market stress emerge.
USDE will likely maintain its peg through normal market conditions, but extreme scenarios could push it significantly above or below $1.00. A break above $1.02 suggests flight-to-safety demand exceeding supply, while a move below $0.98 indicates peg mechanism failure.
The probability-weighted outcome favors range trading between $0.99-$1.01 for the next 60 days, but the risk-reward profile suggests positioning for the outlier scenarios. Tight stops at $0.98 and $1.02 protect against false breakouts while capturing any genuine depegging event.
Watch for volume spikes above $50 million daily as the first signal that institutional players are repositioning. When USDE starts moving, the initial direction will likely determine whether it's a brief deviation or structural breakdown of the peg mechanism.

item.title: TON Breaks Critical $1.30 Support - $1.19 Next Stop Within 72 Hours | TON's 5% plunge through the $1.30 convergence zone sets up a direct path to $1.24, then $... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260419-prediction-ton-breaks-critical-130-support-119-next
item.description:
Original title: TON Breaks Critical $1.30 Support - $1.19 Next Stop Within 72 Hours Summary: TON's 5% plunge through the $1.30 convergence zone sets up a direct path to $1.24, then $1.19 as momentum indicators confirm the breakdown. Bears control this market until proven otherwise. Article text: TON's 5% plunge through the $1.30 convergence zone sets up a direct path to $1.24, then $1.19 as momentum indicators confirm the breakdown. Bears control this market until proven otherwise.
TON crashed through $1.30 today after forming a textbook bear flag, confirming what momentum indicators have been telegraphing for days. The token's inability to hold above the 20-day and 50-day moving average convergence at $1.31 removes the last technical safety net protecting higher prices.
Today's 5.12% drop to $1.26 wasn't random profit-taking—it was algorithmic selling that targeted the exact level where bulls needed to make their stand. The failure here opens a clear technical pathway down to $1.24, then $1.19 where the next meaningful support cluster sits.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
The RSI at 46.42 shows selling pressure without oversold relief in sight, while the MACD's move toward negative territory removes any hope of near-term bullish divergence. More importantly, the 7-day simple moving average now sits $0.09 above current price at $1.39, creating a technical ceiling that will cap any bounce attempts.
Bollinger Bands tell the real story here—the current %B reading at 0.45 places TON in the lower half of its trading range, with room to fall toward the lower band at $1.14. The bands themselves are compressing, suggesting the next move will be violent and directional rather than sideways consolidation.
The derivatives market reveals institutional positioning that contradicts any bullish narrative. While top traders maintain a 54.8% long bias, the negative funding rate of -0.0041% means futures are trading at a discount to spot—classic bear market behavior where nobody wants to pay premium for upside exposure.
Open interest surged 12.23% to $37.9 million as new shorts entered the market, while the 1.24 buy/sell ratio in recent hours shows buying that's more defensive than aggressive. Retail traders remain split at 48.7% long versus 51.3% short, but this balance typically breaks hard in whichever direction momentum confirms.
Technical probability strongly favors continued downside. The $1.24 level represents immediate support where some bounce could occur, but any rally back toward $1.35-$1.36 offers prime shorting opportunities against the broken $1.30 support turned resistance.
The real target sits at $1.19, where monthly support intersects with longer-term moving averages. This represents a logical stopping point for the current decline and offers the first legitimate reversal zone for bulls to consider re-entry.
Current ATR readings of $0.08 suggest daily ranges will expand as volatility increases during this breakdown phase. Position sizing should account for potential $1.22-$1.38 intraday swings, but the directional bias remains firmly bearish until TON can reclaim and hold above $1.33 on meaningful volume.
The market structure has shifted from consolidation to distribution. Trade accordingly.

item.title: Warren Accuses SEC Chair Atkins of Misleading Congress on Enforcement Drop | Senator Elizabeth Warren claims SEC Chair Paul Atkins may have deliberately misled Congre... https://Blockchain.News/news/warren-accuses-sec-atkins-misleading-congress-enforcement
item.description:
Original title: Warren Accuses SEC Chair Atkins of Misleading Congress on Enforcement Drop Summary: Senator Elizabeth Warren claims SEC Chair Paul Atkins may have deliberately misled Congress about plummeting enforcement activity under Trump administration. Article text: Senator Elizabeth Warren claims SEC Chair Paul Atkins may have deliberately misled Congress about plummeting enforcement activity under Trump administration.
Senator Elizabeth Warren has escalated her battle with SEC Chair Paul Atkins, accusing him of potentially lying to Congress about the agency's enforcement activity—which has fallen to its lowest level in over two decades.
In a letter dated April 15, Warren pointed to enforcement data the SEC released on April 7 showing that enforcement actions initiated in fiscal year 2025 hit a decade low. She claims this directly contradicts Atkins' evasive responses during a February 12 congressional hearing.
"At the hearing, I specifically asked you to comment on publicly available data highlighting a decline in SEC enforcement activity," Warren wrote. "In response, you demurred, stating that you were 'not sure what data' I was looking at."
That deflection now looks deliberate, Warren argues. The hearing occurred more than four months after fiscal year 2025 ended—plenty of time for Atkins to know the numbers.
The enforcement collapse has clear ramifications for crypto markets. Under the Trump administration, the SEC has systematically rolled back its aggressive posture toward digital assets, settling or outright dismissing lawsuits initiated during the Biden era.
For crypto companies previously in the SEC's crosshairs, this represents a dramatic shift. Projects that spent millions on legal defense are seeing cases evaporate. But Warren frames the pullback differently—as the agency "largely abdicating its enforcement responsibilities."
The data Warren references shows enforcement activity at its lowest point in more than 20 years, not just in crypto but across the SEC's entire mandate.
Warren's letter demands answers by April 28. She wants to know whether Atkins was aware of the enforcement decline when he testified and requests an explanation for the dramatic dropoff.
For traders, the regulatory environment remains favorable in the near term. But Warren's aggressive posturing signals that any shift in political power could reverse course quickly. The top Democrat on the Senate Banking Committee isn't letting this go—and she's building a paper trail that could resurface if enforcement priorities change.
Whether Atkins actually misled Congress or simply dodged an uncomfortable question, the exchange highlights just how politicized crypto regulation has become. Market participants should expect this tension to persist through the current administration.

item.title: Kelp DAO Exploited for $293M in Largest DeFi Hack of 2026 | Kelp's rsETH bridge drained of $293M as attacker converts stolen funds to ETH. Aave freez... https://Blockchain.News/news/kelp-dao-exploited-293m-largest-defi-hack-2026
item.description:
Original title: Kelp DAO Exploited for $293M in Largest DeFi Hack of 2026 Summary: Kelp's rsETH bridge drained of $293M as attacker converts stolen funds to ETH. Aave freezes markets, nine protocols impacted in cascading DeFi crisis. Article text: Kelp's rsETH bridge drained of $293M as attacker converts stolen funds to ETH. Aave freezes markets, nine protocols impacted in cascading DeFi crisis.
Kelp DAO's rsETH adapter bridge was exploited Saturday for approximately $293 million, marking the largest single protocol hack of 2026 and triggering emergency freezes across at least nine DeFi platforms with exposure to the liquid restaking token.
The attacker funded their wallet through Tornado Cash and has already converted roughly $250 million of the stolen assets to ETH, according to blockchain security firm Cyvers. Kelp has paused rsETH contracts on Ethereum mainnet and multiple Layer-2 networks while investigating.
Aave moved quickly to freeze rsETH markets on both V3 and V4 deployments. The lending protocol's AAVE token dropped 10% following the news, while ETH fell 3.74% to $2,401.60 amid broader market jitters.
"This is exactly the kind of incident that highlights the risks of composability in DeFi," Cyvers CEO Deddy Lavid told Cointelegraph. When one protocol's token is integrated across multiple platforms, a single exploit can cascade through the entire ecosystem.
Kelp DAO, founded by Stader Labs co-founders Amitej Gajjala and Dheeraj Borra, lets users deposit liquid staking tokens like stETH to receive rsETH—a token that earns yields from both Ethereum staking and EigenLayer services. That deep integration made rsETH attractive for yield strategies but also created systemic risk.
The Kelp hack follows Drift Protocol's $280 million exploit earlier in April. Drift's post-mortem revealed attackers spent months infiltrating the team after meeting developers at a crypto conference—a sophisticated social engineering campaign linked to suspected North Korean state hackers.
Combined with other incidents, Q1 2026 saw $482 million lost to hacks and scams. The Kelp exploit alone exceeds 60% of that quarterly total.
Kelp hasn't responded to press inquiries. For rsETH holders, options are limited while contracts remain paused. Users with rsETH collateral on frozen lending markets face potential liquidation risks if freezes lift before the situation stabilizes.
The attack vector—targeting a bridge adapter rather than core protocol logic—echoes previous high-profile exploits. Bridge contracts remain DeFi's most vulnerable attack surface, handling cross-chain value transfers with complex security requirements.
Traders should monitor announcements from affected protocols and avoid interacting with rsETH-related contracts until Kelp provides clarity on the exploit's scope and any potential recovery plans.

Kelp hasn't responded to press inquiries. For rsETH holders, options are limited while contracts remain paused. Users with rsETH collateral on frozen lending markets face potential liquidation risks if freezes lift before the situation stabilizes. Source: https://Blockchain.News/news/kelp-dao-exploited-293m-largest-defi-hack-2026
item.content:encoded:
Kelp's rsETH bridge drained of $293M as attacker converts stolen funds to ETH. Aave freezes markets, nine protocols impacted in cascading DeFi crisis.
Kelp DAO's rsETH adapter bridge was exploited Saturday for approximately $293 million, marking the largest single protocol hack of 2026 and triggering emergency freezes across at least nine DeFi platforms with exposure to the liquid restaking token.
The attacker funded their wallet through Tornado Cash and has already converted roughly $250 million of the stolen assets to ETH, according to blockchain security firm Cyvers. Kelp has paused rsETH contracts on Ethereum mainnet and multiple Layer-2 networks while investigating.
Aave moved quickly to freeze rsETH markets on both V3 and V4 deployments. The lending protocol's AAVE token dropped 10% following the news, while ETH fell 3.74% to $2,401.60 amid broader market jitters.
"This is exactly the kind of incident that highlights the risks of composability in DeFi," Cyvers CEO Deddy Lavid told Cointelegraph. When one protocol's token is integrated across multiple platforms, a single exploit can cascade through the entire ecosystem.
Kelp DAO, founded by Stader Labs co-founders Amitej Gajjala and Dheeraj Borra, lets users deposit liquid staking tokens like stETH to receive rsETH—a token that earns yields from both Ethereum staking and EigenLayer services. That deep integration made rsETH attractive for yield strategies but also created systemic risk.
The Kelp hack follows Drift Protocol's $280 million exploit earlier in April. Drift's post-mortem revealed attackers spent months infiltrating the team after meeting developers at a crypto conference—a sophisticated social engineering campaign linked to suspected North Korean state hackers.
Combined with other incidents, Q1 2026 saw $482 million lost to hacks and scams. The Kelp exploit alone exceeds 60% of that quarterly total.
Kelp hasn't responded to press inquiries. For rsETH holders, options are limited while contracts remain paused. Users with rsETH collateral on frozen lending markets face potential liquidation risks if freezes lift before the situation stabilizes.
The attack vector—targeting a bridge adapter rather than core protocol logic—echoes previous high-profile exploits. Bridge contracts remain DeFi's most vulnerable attack surface, handling cross-chain value transfers with complex security requirements.
Traders should monitor announcements from affected protocols and avoid interacting with rsETH-related contracts until Kelp provides clarity on the exploit's scope and any potential recovery plans.

item.title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Dips 1.1% as Miners Dump Record BTC Stash | BTC mining difficulty fell to 135.5T on Saturday, while public miners sold over 32,000 BT... https://Blockchain.News/news/bitcoin-mining-difficulty-dips-miners-sell-record-btc
item.description:
Original title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Dips 1.1% as Miners Dump Record BTC Stash Summary: BTC mining difficulty fell to 135.5T on Saturday, while public miners sold over 32,000 BTC in Q1 2026 alone—more than all of 2025 combined. Article text: BTC mining difficulty fell to 135.5T on Saturday, while public miners sold over 32,000 BTC in Q1 2026 alone—more than all of 2025 combined.
Bitcoin's mining difficulty dropped to approximately 135.5 trillion on Saturday, a 1.1% decline that offers brief relief to an industry hemorrhaging cash at an alarming rate.
The reprieve won't last long. According to CoinWarz data, difficulty is projected to climb back to 137.43T when the next adjustment hits on May 1, 2026—roughly 13 days away.
Public mining companies have been forced into a fire sale. MARA, CleanSpark, Riot, Cango, Core Scientific, and Bitdeer collectively dumped more than 32,000 BTC during Q1 2026, according to TheEnergyMag. That single quarter exceeds their combined sales across all four quarters of 2025.
For perspective: the last time miners sold this aggressively was Q2 2022, when the Terra-Luna collapse triggered an industry-wide panic. Back then, they moved 20,000 BTC. This quarter's selling pressure is 60% worse.
The math simply doesn't work for many operators anymore. CoinShares estimates that up to 20% of Bitcoin miners are currently unprofitable under existing conditions. Their Q1 2026 mining report called Q4 2025 "the most challenging quarter for Bitcoin miners since the April 2024 halving."
First, the October 2025 correction gutted revenues. BTC cratered from roughly $125,000 to about $86,000 by December—a 31% drawdown that crushed margins.
Second, difficulty keeps grinding higher even as prices stagnate. More computational power chasing the same block rewards means each BTC costs more to produce.
Third, energy prices and geopolitical disruptions have inflated operating costs across the board. Miners pay bills in dollars, not satoshis.
The difficulty adjustment on May 1 will push the metric to 137.43T, squeezing margins further for operators already underwater. With production costs exceeding spot prices for a significant chunk of the network, expect continued selling pressure—and potentially more miners throwing in the towel.
The survivors will be those with the cheapest power contracts and the deepest pockets. Everyone else is just treading water until they drown.

item.title: PORTAL Price Prediction: Overbought Rally Eyes $0.018 Before Potential 50% Correction | PORTAL's 33% surge pushes RSI above 74, setting up a potential bounce to $0.018 resistanc... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260418-price-prediction-portal-overbought-rally...
item.description:
Original title: PORTAL Price Prediction: Overbought Rally Eyes $0.018 Before Potential 50% Correction Summary: PORTAL's 33% surge pushes RSI above 74, setting up a potential bounce to $0.018 resistance before bearish divergence could trigger a correction toward $0.007 support levels. Article text: PORTAL's 33% surge pushes RSI above 74, setting up a potential bounce to $0.018 resistance before bearish divergence could trigger a correction toward $0.007 support levels.
PORTAL exploded 33% in 24 hours, driving the RSI to 74.22 and pushing price well into overbought territory. The violent move from $0.009 to current levels shows the type of parabolic action that typically precedes either continuation or sharp reversals in low-cap altcoins.
Price broke above short-term moving averages but faces a critical test at the 200-period simple moving average around $0.02. The Bollinger Band position indicates price is trading well outside normal statistical ranges, suggesting either a breakout attempt or mean reversion setup.
The current rally has PORTAL testing key resistance zones after months of consolidation. Volume patterns during the surge show increasing participation, though the sustainability of this momentum depends on whether buyers can establish support above previous resistance levels.
Support structure remains concentrated around the $0.01 psychological level, with deeper backing near $0.007. The gap between these levels creates a technical vacuum that could accelerate any potential correction once momentum shifts.
Trading activity shows the classic hallmarks of retail participation during sharp moves. The options market positioning and derivatives flows suggest mixed sentiment, with both bullish momentum traders and cautious contrarians taking positions.
The broader altcoin environment continues to influence PORTAL's price action, as correlations with other low-cap tokens remain elevated during periods of increased volatility.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
Bullish continuation: PORTAL could extend gains toward $0.018 resistance if buying momentum sustains above $0.012. This represents the next logical target based on previous swing highs and measured move calculations.
Bearish reversal setup: Should momentum stall near current levels, a correction toward $0.007 becomes probable. This would represent approximately 50% retracement from recent highs and align with typical altcoin correction patterns.
Key levels to monitor: A break above $0.016 with volume could signal continuation toward $0.018. Conversely, failure to hold $0.012 support opens the door for deeper retracement.
Risk management: The overbought condition suggests position sizing should account for potential volatility in either direction. Any trades should incorporate stops beyond key technical levels rather than arbitrary percentages.
The setup presents a classic momentum versus mean reversion scenario common in altcoin markets, where technical extremes often resolve through either powerful breakouts or sharp corrections.

item.title: ASTER Price Prediction: Smart Money Divergence Signals $0.72 Breakout Within 7 Days | While retail traders flood into long positions at 57.4%, whales are positioning even more... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260418-price-prediction-aster-smart-money-diverge...
item.description:
Original title: ASTER Price Prediction: Smart Money Divergence Signals $0.72 Breakout Within 7 Days Summary: While retail traders flood into long positions at 57.4%, whales are positioning even more aggressively at 62.4% long exposure, creating a dangerous consensus that typically precedes violent moves. Article text: While retail traders flood into long positions at 57.4%, whales are positioning even more aggressively at 62.4% long exposure, creating a dangerous consensus that typically precedes violent moves. ...
ASTER is trading in a death grip at $0.67, down 3.04% in the last 24 hours but showing classic signs of a coiled spring. The token has been grinding sideways with all major moving averages converging at virtually identical levels - SMA 7, 20, EMA 12, and EMA 26 all clustered around $0.67. This isn't consolidation; it's compression before expansion.
The derivatives market is screaming divergence. Open interest surged 2.25% to $76 million while aggressive buyers dominated with a 1.16 taker buy/sell ratio. When volume increases during sideways price action, smart money is accumulating while retail thinks nothing is happening.
The technical picture reveals a textbook compression pattern. ASTER sits perfectly centered in its Bollinger Bands at 0.50 position, with the upper band at $0.68 acting as immediate resistance and lower support holding firm at $0.65. The bands are tightening, indicating an imminent volatility expansion.
Moving average convergence at $0.67 creates a magnetic price level where institutional algorithms are programmed to react. The RSI hovering at 48.38 provides no directional bias, but this neutral positioning actually favors explosive moves in either direction. MACD sitting at zero with a flat histogram confirms we're at an inflection point.
Critical levels are crystal clear: $0.69 immediate resistance must break to trigger momentum algorithms, while $0.65 support represents the last line of defense before capitulation to $0.64 strong support.
Here's where it gets interesting - there's absolutely zero KOL chatter about ASTER right now. No predictions, no hype, no fear-mongering. This silence is deafening in crypto markets where narrative typically drives price action. Smart money operates in this vacuum.
The derivatives positioning tells the real story. Both retail (57.4% long) and whales (62.4% long) are betting on upside, but the whale concentration is what matters. When sophisticated traders align with retail on direction but with higher conviction, it typically signals they know something the market hasn't priced in yet.
Funding rates at 0.0050% remain neutral, indicating no excessive leverage buildup that could trigger liquidation cascades. This clean positioning setup reduces downside risk and increases breakout probability.
The setup screams controlled breakout trade with asymmetric risk/reward. Entry zone sits between $0.675-$0.68 on any push above the converged moving averages with volume confirmation. This gives you position before the momentum algorithms trigger at $0.69.
Stop-loss must be tight at $0.645, just below the Bollinger lower band and daily support. This 3.7% risk provides excellent risk management while staying above the panic zone where retail stops cluster.
Primary target hits $0.72 strong resistance for a clean 7.5% gain from entry. This level has institutional significance and represents the next major supply zone. Secondary target extends to $0.75 if momentum sustains, but profit-taking at $0.72 is the high-probability play.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
Risk-reward favors the bulls 2:1, but timing is everything. The compression pattern typically resolves within 3-7 trading days, making this a short-term momentum play rather than a position trade. Watch for volume expansion above $25 million daily to confirm institutional participation.
The smart money positioning combined with technical compression creates a setup that's 65% probability for upside breakout versus 35% for breakdown. In crypto markets, that edge is tradeable.

item.title: SAPIEN Eyes $0.12 Recovery as $0.09 Support Holds Strong | SAPIEN's 18% drop to $0.09 creates an attractive entry point as technical indicators sugg... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260418-prediction-sapien-eyes-012-recovery-as-009-support
item.description:
Original title: SAPIEN Eyes $0.12 Recovery as $0.09 Support Holds Strong Summary: SAPIEN's 18% drop to $0.09 creates an attractive entry point as technical indicators suggest consolidation rather than breakdown. The $0.08-$0.085 support zone offers compelling risk-reward for a b Article text: SAPIEN's 18% drop to $0.09 creates an attractive entry point as technical indicators suggest consolidation rather than breakdown. The $0.08-$0.085 support zone offers compelling risk-reward for a b...
SAPIEN absorbed significant selling pressure today, dropping 18% from $0.12 to current levels around $0.09. However, the technical damage appears contained. The RSI reading of 58 indicates the token hasn't reached oversold conditions, while price action suggests profit-taking rather than panic selling.
The recent selloff brought SAPIEN down from extended levels near the upper Bollinger Band, creating space for a potential recovery move. Price remains above the critical 7-period simple moving average at $0.08, establishing this level as immediate support. The MACD shows momentum has stalled but hasn't turned decisively bearish, leaving room for bulls to regain control.
Today's decline came with substantial volume of nearly $7 million in spot trading - indicating genuine price discovery rather than thin-book manipulation. The derivatives market showed significant deleveraging with open interest dropping 54%, clearing out speculative positions that could have created additional selling pressure.
Current positioning shows institutional players maintaining measured bullish exposure while retail sentiment remains relatively balanced. The neutral funding rate of 0.005% suggests neither longs nor shorts are paying significant premiums, creating space for directional moves without funding headwinds.
The technical setup supports a bounce scenario over the next 14 days. SAPIEN's ability to hold above $0.08 support while maintaining constructive indicator readings creates favorable conditions for recovery toward $0.11 resistance.
A successful defense of the $0.08-$0.085 zone would likely trigger short covering and renewed buying interest, potentially driving price back toward today's $0.12 highs. However, a break below $0.08 could extend the correction toward stronger support around $0.06.
The current consolidation pattern suggests SAPIEN is building a base for the next leg higher rather than beginning a deeper correction. Traders should watch for volume expansion and momentum divergences to confirm the direction of the next significant move.
Strategic entry levels include 40% allocation at $0.085, 35% at $0.08, and 25% at $0.075. Risk management requires stops below $0.06 with profit targets at $0.11 and $0.125 respectively.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.

item.title: AAVE Targeting $125 Breakout as Whales Load Up During Retail Panic | AAVE's 4.6% drop to $111 triggered classic retail capitulation while whales positioned fo... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260418-prediction-aave-targeting-125-breakout-as-whales-load
item.description:
Original title: AAVE Targeting $125 Breakout as Whales Load Up During Retail Panic Summary: AAVE's 4.6% drop to $111 triggered classic retail capitulation while whales positioned for the next leg higher. The setup points to $125 within two weeks if bulls reclaim $116 resistance. Article text: AAVE's 4.6% drop to $111 triggered classic retail capitulation while whales positioned for the next leg higher. The setup points to $125 within two weeks if bulls reclaim $116 resistance.
AAVE's sharp 4.6% selloff to $111.43 created the exact type of shakeout that precedes major moves higher. While retail traders hit the exits, institutional positioning data reveals a completely different story unfolding beneath the surface.
The derivatives positioning couldn't be clearer - top traders hold 62% long exposure while retail maintains 58% bullish bets. This alignment between sophisticated and retail money rarely fails to produce follow-through. More telling is the controlled nature of today's selling, with open interest dropping just 3.6% as weak hands got flushed out rather than panic liquidations cascading through the market.
Volume patterns support this thesis. The $19.4 million in 24-hour trading represents healthy rotation, not capitulation. The aggressive 0.75 taker ratio in the final hour shows selling exhaustion rather than the beginning of a broader breakdown.
AAVE sits compressed near the top of its recent range despite today's red candle. The token trades at 0.93 on its Bollinger Band scale, essentially hugging the upper boundary at $113.53. This positioning after a down day signals coiling energy rather than distribution.
The momentum oscillators paint a picture of pause, not reversal. RSI maintains a healthy 59 reading - nowhere near oversold territory despite the selloff. The MACD sits flat at zero, marking a genuine inflection point where the next directional move will likely be decisive.
Volatility remains elevated with a $7.61 average true range, confirming that rapid moves in either direction remain possible. However, the technical evidence strongly suggests the next major move breaks higher.
The roadmap to $125 runs through $116.60 resistance. A decisive break above this level within 48 hours would trigger momentum buying and force short covering above today's $118.87 high. From there, the next meaningful resistance doesn't appear until $121.76, with $125 representing the logical measured move target.
The timing looks right for this scenario. Neutral funding rates at 0.0066% indicate no excessive leverage buildup that could derail a rally through forced liquidations. The market structure favors organic buying rather than short squeezes, which tend to produce more sustainable moves.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
Support holds at $108.54, where buyers should step in if the bull thesis remains valid. A break below this level would target $105.64 and potentially the 50-day moving average, but current positioning makes this outcome unlikely.
The confluence of whale accumulation, technical compression, and controlled selling creates a high-probability setup for AAVE to challenge $125 within the next two weeks. The current price action represents opportunity disguised as weakness - exactly what institutional buyers look for when building positions ahead of the next leg higher.

item.title: ALICE Price Prediction: $0.27 Retest Within 48 Hours or $0.12 Collapse | With RSI screaming 86.30 and price trading 55% above all moving averages, ALICE is primed... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260418-price-prediction-alice-027-retest-within-48-hours-or
item.description:
Original title: ALICE Price Prediction: $0.27 Retest Within 48 Hours or $0.12 Collapse Summary: With RSI screaming 86.30 and price trading 55% above all moving averages, ALICE is primed for either a violent rejection at $0.27 resistance (70% probability) or a momentum-driven breakout to $0.34 Article text: With RSI screaming 86.30 and price trading 55% above all moving averages, ALICE is primed for either a violent rejection at $0.27 resistance (70% probability) or a momentum-driven breakout to $0.34...
ALICE just detonated 54% in 24 hours, rocketing from $0.12 to $0.19 on massive $31.6M volume. This isn't some gentle accumulation - this is pure FOMO fuel hitting an RSI of 86.30, the kind of reading that makes seasoned traders reach for their short buttons. The price is trading a staggering 58% above its 20-day moving average at $0.12, creating a gap so wide you could drive a truck through it.
The Bollinger Band position at 1.55 tells the real story - ALICE has blown through the upper band like it doesn't exist. When %B readings exceed 1.0, you're in no-man's land where traditional support levels become meaningless and gravity starts looking very attractive.
The technical landscape is brutally clear. Immediate resistance sits at $0.26 - yesterday's intraday high that represents the first real test of conviction. Above that, the strong resistance at $0.34 becomes the final boss level where profit-taking will hit like a sledgehammer.
On the downside, the entire moving average complex has collapsed into a tight cluster between $0.12-$0.13. This convergence zone represents the gravitational center where price wants to return. Below $0.12, there's essentially nothing but air until the strong support at $0.05 - a level that would represent a 74% haircut from current prices.
The daily ATR of $0.02 suggests normal volatility, but today's price action has already exceeded that by 10x, indicating we're in an abnormal volatility regime where normal rules don't apply.
The derivatives market is painting a fascinating picture of conflicting signals. Both retail (58.9% long) and smart money (59.1% long) are positioned bullish, yet the funding rate has gone deeply negative at -0.47%, meaning shorts are getting paid to hold their positions. This divergence screams institutional hedging against retail euphoria.
Open interest dropped 7% as price surged, indicating this move is driven by spot buying rather than leveraged speculation. That's actually constructive - it means real money is chasing ALICE, not just degenerate gamblers with 20x leverage.
With no fresh KOL predictions to fuel the narrative and the recent "Chapter One" game launch already 9 months in the rearview mirror, this rally appears to be purely technical momentum rather than fundamental catalyst-driven.
Bearish Setup (70% probability): Short ALICE between $0.24-$0.27 with stops above $0.28. Target the $0.15 level first, then $0.12 if momentum accelerates. The risk-reward here is exceptional - risking $0.04 to make $0.09-$0.12.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
Bullish Breakout Play (30% probability): Only enter long positions above $0.27 with confirmed volume. Target $0.34 with stops below $0.24. This is the lower probability trade, but the payoff to $0.34 justifies the risk for momentum players.
Conservative Approach: Wait for the inevitable pullback to the $0.15-$0.17 zone where the moving averages will eventually catch up. That's where the real accumulation opportunity lies, not at these nose-bleed levels.
The clock is ticking on this parabolic move. RSI readings above 85 rarely sustain for more than 2-3 sessions. Smart money will use any approach to $0.27 as their exit ramp.

item.title: AUDIO Targets $0.035 Breakout as Dead Cat Bounce Turns Bull Trap | AUDIO's violent bounce from $0.02 support sets up a clean run to $0.035 resistance within... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260418-prediction-audio-targets-0035-breakout-as-dead-cat
item.description:
Original title: AUDIO Targets $0.035 Breakout as Dead Cat Bounce Turns Bull Trap Summary: AUDIO's violent bounce from $0.02 support sets up a clean run to $0.035 resistance within 10 days. The 41% intraday range signals accumulation, not distribution. Article text: AUDIO's violent bounce from $0.02 support sets up a clean run to $0.035 resistance within 10 days. The 41% intraday range signals accumulation, not distribution.
AUDIO just carved out the kind of intraday violence that separates real moves from fake pumps. The $0.021 to $0.031 range in a single session wasn't random - it was systematic accumulation disguised as chaos. While retail panicked on the -10.86% daily close, smart money stepped in at precisely $0.02.
This is textbook whale behavior. Create fear, accumulate size, then push price through the next resistance level before anyone realizes what happened. The streaming token space has been left for dead, making AUDIO the perfect contrarian play as Web3 music platforms prepare for their next growth cycle.
The technical picture reveals a coiled spring ready to explode higher. AUDIO bounced hard off $0.02 support while RSI held above 60 - buyers aren't exhausted despite the surface-level selling pressure. The Bollinger Band kiss at 1.03 triggered profit-taking from underwater holders, but that selling is now absorbed.
Volume tells the real story: $19.8 million in daily turnover represents nearly double recent averages. This isn't retail FOMO - institutional players are positioning for a directional break above $0.025. The MACD sitting at zero creates the perfect launch pad for momentum acceleration once buyers regain control.
AUDIO's path to $0.035 becomes inevitable once it reclaims $0.025 with conviction. That level represents the previous support-turned-resistance from earlier consolidation patterns. Break above it with volume, and the streaming token has a clear runway to the next major barrier.
The beauty of this setup lies in its simplicity. AUDIO has already shown it can move 40%+ intraday when conditions align. A sustained push through $0.025 triggers algorithmic buying and forces shorts to cover, creating the momentum feedback loop needed to reach $0.035.
Market structure supports this thesis. The 95% decline from all-time highs has washed out weak hands and reset expectations to basement levels. When sentiment shifts, AUDIO moves faster than larger-cap alternatives because of its smaller float and concentrated holder base.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
The trade is straightforward: buy any weakness near $0.022 with a tight stop below $0.019. Target the $0.035 zone for a 59% return while risking just 14% downside. This 4:1 reward-to-risk ratio compensates for the inherent volatility in smaller streaming tokens.
Time horizon matters here. AUDIO needs to reclaim $0.025 within the next 7 days or risk another leg lower toward $0.015. The streaming token won't wait for broader market conditions to improve - it either breaks out now or continues the grinding decline that's defined its chart for months.
Position accordingly. This isn't a long-term hold or DCA situation. AUDIO represents pure momentum speculation with a defined catalyst window. Miss the move, and you'll wait months for another setup this clean.

AUDIO bounced hard off $0.02 support while RSI held above 60 - buyers aren't exhausted despite the surface-level selling pressure. The Bollinger Band kiss at 1.03 triggered profit-taking from underwater holders, but that selling is now absorbed.
Volume tells the real story: $19.8 million in daily turnover represents nearly double recent averages. This isn't retail FOMO - institutional players are positioning for a directional break above $0.025. The MACD sitting at zero creates the perfect launch pad for momentum acceleration once buyers regain control.
AUDIO's path to $0.035 becomes inevitable once it reclaims $0.025 with conviction. That level represents the previous support-turned-resistance from earlier consolidation patterns. Break above it with volume, and the streaming token has a clear runway to the next major barrier.
The beauty of this setup lies in its simplicity. AUDIO has already shown it can move 40%+ intraday when conditions align. A sustained push through $0.025 triggers algorithmic buying and forces shorts to cover, creating the momentum feedback loop needed to reach $0.035.
Market structure supports this thesis. The 95% decline from all-time highs has washed out weak hands and reset expectations to basement levels. When sentiment shifts, AUDIO moves faster than larger-cap alternatives because of its smaller float and concentrated holder base. Source: https://Blockchain.News/news/20260418-prediction-audio-targets-0035-breakout-as-dead-cat

item.title: AVNT Breaks to $0.18 Within 30 Days on Whale Accumulation | AVNT's technical consolidation at $0.14 masks aggressive institutional positioning, with... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260418-prediction-avnt-breaks-to-018-within-30-days
item.description:
Original title: AVNT Breaks to $0.18 Within 30 Days on Whale Accumulation Summary: AVNT's technical consolidation at $0.14 masks aggressive institutional positioning, with whales long at 59.5% while retail bleeds out. The 85% drawdown from highs creates a compressed spring ready Article text: AVNT's technical consolidation at $0.14 masks aggressive institutional positioning, with whales long at 59.5% while retail bleeds out. The 85% drawdown from highs creates a compressed spring ready ...
AVNT is forming a textbook accumulation base that retail traders are completely missing. The token sits compressed between $0.13-$0.15, with RSI neutral at 52.73 and MACD flatlined - classic signs of institutional absorption before major moves.
The critical detail everyone's overlooking: we're trading 85% below the 200-day SMA at $0.35. Assets this oversold with solid fundamentals don't stay buried forever. The Bollinger Band position at 0.84 shows we're testing upper resistance at $0.15, setting up the launch pad for the next leg higher.
Hourly candlesticks (about 96 bars), same endpoint as our cryptocurrency price pages. Numbers below refresh from 1-minute klines.
The derivatives data tells the real story while retail panics. Top traders hold net long positions at 59.5% versus retail's measly 56.2%. Open interest dropped 3.27% to $4.7M as weak hands exit, but this position trimming creates the exact liquidity whales need for larger accumulation.
Volume of $311M over 24 hours confirms genuine institutional interest, not dead money. The aggressive sell pressure in short-term taker ratios (0.76) actually works in bulls' favor - it's providing the absorption zone smart money demands before major breakouts.
The setup is becoming undeniable. AVNT needs to clear $0.15 resistance (the 50-day SMA) to trigger the institutional buying programs. Once that level breaks, algorithms will chase momentum toward $0.18 - representing a clean 28% move from current levels.
The downside protection remains solid at $0.13 support, creating an asymmetric risk profile that professional traders dream about. Any break below $0.125 would invalidate the thesis, but current positioning data suggests institutions won't let that happen.
AVNT breaks $0.15 within the next 7-10 days, then runs to $0.18 before month-end. The whale positioning combined with extreme oversold conditions from longer timeframes creates the perfect storm for a relief rally.
Risk management stays tight: stop losses at $0.125, profit targets at $0.18. The risk-reward ratio heavily favors bulls, and in institutional trading, you don't get many setups this clean. AVNT delivers $0.18 within 30 days.
